top_signals.title: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
top_signals.summary: Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma's race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking in 2026 is off to a strong start.

top_signals.title: New Excursion Boat Debuts at Port of Los Angeles
top_signals.summary: A new hybrid, 350-passenger vessel is now in operation at the Port of Los Angeles, the result of a Port-led partnership with Harbor Breeze Cruises, the California Air Resources Board (CARB), and the Port of Long Beach.The Harbor Breeze Cruises’…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
